criteria.name: User Base
criteria.description: The total number of active users on the platform.

criteria.name: Music Library Size
criteria.description: The total number of songs available in the app's library.

criteria.name: AI Features
criteria.description: The presence and sophistication of AI-powered features such as personalized recommendations, voice assistants, and automated playlists.
criteria.sources: Official app descriptions, tech blogs, user reviews

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience
criteria.description: The overall design, ease of use, and user satisfaction with the app's interface.
criteria.sources: User reviews, tech blogs, app store ratings

criteria.name: Subscription Cost
criteria.description: The cost of premium subscription plans, if applicable.

criteria.name: Platform Availability
criteria.description: The number of platforms the app is available on (e.g., iOS, Android, Web, Desktop).
criteria.sources: Official app websites, app store listings

criteria.name: User Reviews and Ratings
criteria.description: The average rating and number of reviews on app stores.

criteria.name: Unique Features
criteria.description: Any unique features that set the app apart from competitors, such as exclusive content, social features, or integration with other services.
criteria.sources: Official app descriptions, tech blogs, user reviews
